import qlib
from qlib.data.dataset import DatasetH
from qlib.contrib.data.handler import Alpha158
from qlib.data.dataset.handler import DataHandlerLP
import numpy as np

qlib.init(provider_uri='/data/qlib_data', region='cn')
handler = Alpha158(
    start_time='2008-01-01',
    end_time='2021-12-31',
    fit_start_time='2008-01-01',
    fit_end_time='2020-12-31',
    instruments='csi300',
)
dataset = DatasetH(handler=handler, segments={
    'train': ('2008-01-01', '2020-12-31'),
    'valid': ('2021-01-01', '2021-12-31'),
})
train_df = dataset.prepare('train', col_set=['feature', 'label'], data_key=DataHandlerLP.DK_L)
train_df = train_df.dropna()
y = train_df['label'].values.squeeze()
print('LABEL_STATS:', {
    'mean': float(y.mean()),
    'std': float(y.std()),
    'min': float(y.min()),
    'max': float(y.max()),
    'p1': float(np.percentile(y, 1)),
    'p99': float(np.percentile(y, 99)),
    'median': float(np.median(y)),
    'shape': y.shape,
})
